title: Better Wolf Teleportation
body:
Your wolves never follow up when you are crossing the sea or using the elytra? Accidentially died thousands blocks away from home so your wolves could never be found? If these sound familiar to you, you've found the right data pack.
With this data pack, your wolves, cats and parrots will always try to follow you. When you die, they will go home by themselves.
Note that sometimes they may be teleported to an underground cave when you're on the sea, but they'll follow up as soon as you reach the lands.
